name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Tab navigation for switching between content panels with active state tracking.

docs.overview: Tabs provide tab navigation for switching between content panels. Use Tabs to organize content into selectable sections with an active tab indicator.
docs.accessibility: Tab triggers use role 'tab' and tab content uses role 'tabpanel'. Ensure each tab has a descriptive label.

platformNotes.macos: Renders as a segmented-style tab bar with native styling.
platformNotes.web: Renders as a styled tab list with ARIA roles.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of tab items with label, value, and content

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initially active tab value; defaults to the first item

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when the active tab changes

examples.name: default
examples.title: Basic Tabs

examples.name: with-default
examples.title: Tabs with Default Value

examples.name: with-onchange
examples.title: Tabs with Change Handler

agent.summary: Tabs organize content into selectable sections with tab navigation.
useWhen: Dashboard views with different data sets
doNotUseWhen: Only one section of content exists
layoutHints: Place tabs above the content area
Limit tabs to 5-7 items for usability
Use concise labels for tab triggers
accessibilityChecklist: Each tab trigger has a descriptive label
Active tab state is visually and programmatically indicated
Tab content uses the tabpanel role
